TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-pear_salrabu

S.FORM: ku nadruma iakay kudra tatama ku tanaisi la lredreke ku e kamadha ini si la mulrapace turamuru.
S.TRANSL: 從前，有位中年男子去碰並種非常茂盛的芒果。
In the old times, there is that middle-aged guy who touch and plant very gorgeous mango.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: iakay kudra takavaivai si la kikamadhamadha kudra tatama.
S.TRANSL: 在早上，那中年男子摘芒果。
In the morning, that middle-aged guy pick the mango.

S.FORM: lribate kuini talragi ini maililuku ku kiw si la katuase lribate naw pararubu la kai iya sa ka bilriliane.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友經過並帶著一頭羊，(但)最後(他)沒有說想要幫忙。
His friend passes and brings a goat, (but) (he) does not want to help in the end.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ikay ku tangea ku vavalake ku mualrikilriki li.
S.TRANSL: 然後有個小孩子騎著我的腳踏車。
Then there is one child who are riding my bike.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: e kuini vavalake sa dreele yaie malra surakele kudra vaevae si naw iluku mutavanane.
S.TRANSL: 當這小孩看到，(他)把一籃(放進腳踏車裡)然後想要拿回家。
When this child see (it)，(he) put in one (basket) (into his bike) and want to take (it) home.

S.FORM: e la iya si ala katuatuase ala kipadradresenge kuini ki tangea kuini ki ababay.
S.TRANSL: 然後他離開並遇到一個女生。
Then he leaves, and meet one girl.

S.FORM: sa mulebe nga kuini lasu yaie kaynganganganay kuini tatulru si.
S.TRANSL: 當芒果掉下的時候，有三個小孩過來。
When the mangos have dropped, this three boys comes.

S.FORM: asi aiya kay ki vavalake la iya si.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩怎麼搞的？
Why is this boy (like this)?

S.FORM: ta pararubu la iya la siludu.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們說我們幫這小孩，然後撿起(芒果)。
Then they say we help this boy, and pick up (the mango)

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

S.FORM: pararubu iniane si la papubelenge kuini ki la ruburubu kuini ki karadrare ini.
S.TRANSL: (他們)幫助他：(他們)放上這(籃子)，然後堆上了芒果(進)他的籃子。
(They) help him: (they) put up this (basket), and pile up (the mango) (into) his basket.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.自由斜格
第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kuini vavalake la katuase nga pangudrurudruru.
S.TRANSL: 這男孩然後走了然後停下來。
This boy then has walked away and then stopped

S.FORM: la e dreele kuini la dreele kuini tangea si arakay ngucilri kuini talrupunu ini la siluduana si.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)看到一個他的帽子掉了然後先撿起。
Then (he) sees a hat of him dropped and pick up first.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ala katuase baai kuini ki vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 然後他走開給那小孩(帽子)。
Then he walk away to give (the hat) to the boy.

S.FORM: sa baai kuini ki vavalake la kiaseasene kuini vavalake si baai pakadrusa.
S.TRANSL: 當這小孩給(那帽子)，這小孩被感謝然後這小孩被給了兩個。
When he gives (the hat), this boy is thanked and this boy is given two.

S.FORM: kuini kamadha si la mavalavala kuini lamalala si.
S.TRANSL: 這些芒果然後被分給這些朋友。
These mangos then are distributed to these friends

S.FORM: la katuase la katuase kuini tatulru si.
S.TRANSL: 然後這三個(男孩)走開。
Then the three (boys) walks away.

S.FORM: la dreele kuini tatama si ala ecenge savaeva kuini kamadha i ani miani kay patualay inu kay.
S.TRANSL: 奇怪這(芒果)從哪裡來的？
why does this (mango) come?

S.FORM: e alaw amani kudra e kikamadha li ku akuvaeva la iya kavalrivilringi.
S.TRANSL: 他就很疑慮(是不是)我採的另外一籠。
He is haunted (by the question) is it my other one (basket) of mango?

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格
